# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Write Envoy proxy configuration for HTTP traffic routing. Define listeners on port 80, clusters for backend services, and routes to match requests. Configure connection pooling and health checks for upstream services. This is for our API gateway proxy.
# Category: envoy_no_tls

apiVersion: v1alpha1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: api-gateway
  namespace: gloo
spec:

  virtualHost:

    domains:
    - "*"

    routes:
    - matchers:
      - prefix: /v1/
      routeAction:
        single:
          upstream:
            name: default-global-backend #name of the Upstream. You can find it in the Envoy config
            namespace: gloo
        useProxyProto: true
    options:
      autoHostRewrite: true
<pr_file>/.github/workflows/examples_e2e.yml<pr_base_code>        include:
        - testfiles/virtualservice-grpc-no-metadata-upstream.yaml
        - testfiles/virtualservice-grpc-no-metadata-upstream-mtls.yaml
        - testfiles/virtualservice-http-timeouts.yaml
        - testfiles/virtualservice-http-timeouts-override.yaml

  # Test for virtualservice resource and gateway plugin
  virtual_services:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v2

      - name: Setup Go
        uses: actions/setup-go@v1<pr_file>/.github/workflows/end-to-end.yml<pr_base_code>        include:
          - testfiles/hello-world.yaml
    - name: Test for a basic Hello World with an HTTP VirtualService
      run: ./test.sh testfiles/virtualservice-hello-world-mtls.yaml
        include:
          - testfiles/virtualservice-hello-world-mtls.yaml
          - testfiles/virtualservice-hello-world-no-upstream-mtls.yaml

  # Test for virtualservice resource and gateway plugin
  virtual_services:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v2

      - name: Setup Go
        uses: actions/setup-go@v1
        with:
          go-version: '1.15' # SDK 0.38.0 requires 1.15<pr_file>/.github/workflows/examples_e2e.yml<pr_base_code>name: Examples end to end tests

  # Test for hello world with and without TLS upstream
  hello-world:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v2

      - name: Setup Go
        uses: actions/setup-go@v1<pr_diff><pr_file>/.github/workflows/end-to-end.yml<pr_diff_hunk>@@ -8,9 +8,9 @@
